q: In winter, white snow falls. We make ____ snowman in the garden.
____ sun is very hot in summer.
I see ____ orange leaf falling from the tree.
There is ____ rainbow in the sky after the rain.
____ moon comes out at night and gives us light.
The weather today ____ very sunny and warm.
The clouds ____ grey before it rains.
I ____ cold, so I put on my warm coat.
The trees ____ green in spring.
In autumn many ____ fall from the trees. (leaf)
There are four ____ in a year: spring, summer, autumn and winter. (season)
The little ____ play in the snow when it is winter. (child)
The cat is sleeping ____ the warm sun.
There is white snow ____ the top of the mountain.
The flowers are ____ the green grass in the garden.
The rabbit is hiding ____ the big tree, so we cannot see it.
The bright sun is ____ two big clouds in the sky.
The sun ____ in the east every morning. (rise)
Rain ____ from the clouds when the sky is grey. (fall)
My sister ____ the cold winter weather. (like)
____ the wind blow hard in the storm? (do)
The sky ____ many stars at night. (have)
The trees ____ green leaves in the summer.
____ snowflakes near my window are very white and cold.
Look at ____ big rainbow far away in the sky!
The sun is very hot. ____ gives light to the Earth.
My mother loves spring flowers. ____ favourite flower is the rose. (she)
When the snow is on the road, cars ____ go fast.
____ is the weather today, sunny or rainy?
____ season comes after summer?
A person who teaches children at school is a ____. (job)
I see ____ apple on the table.
She works in ____ hospital near my house.
____ sun is very big and hot.
He wants to buy ____ umbrella for the rain.
My mother ____ a nurse at the clinic.
They ____ firefighters at the fire station.
I ____ a student in this school.
The two cooks ____ in the kitchen.
The dentist looks at my ____. (tooth)
Three ____ work at the police station. (man)
There are many ____ in the big city. (shop)
The bank is ____ the post office and the shop.
The bus stops ____ the corner of the street.
The cat is hiding ____ the table.
The library is ____ to the school.
The picture is ____ the wall in the museum.
The baker ____ fresh bread every morning. (make)
A pilot ____ a big plane. (fly)
____ the doctor work at the hospital? (do)
My dad ____ to work by bus. (go)
The waiter ____ a black uniform. (have)
I ____ a new school bag for class.
____ is my friend, the new teacher. (near)
Look at ____ buildings far away over there.
My sister is a doctor and ____ helps sick people.
The firemen are brave and ____ help the town.
A good cook ____ make tasty food. (be able to)
____ brings our letters to the house? The postman. (person)
____ is the bus station? It is near the park. (place)
You play this sport on ice with a stick and a puck. It is ____. (sport)
I want to be ____ artist when I grow up.
We kick ____ ball when we play football.
My dad bought me ____ new bike for my birthday.
____ sun is shining, so we can play outside.
Tennis ____ my favourite sport.
My friends ____ playing in the park now.
I ____ very good at swimming.
These two footballs ____ new.
A football team has eleven ____. (man)
You run with two ____. (foot)
I have three tennis ____ in my bag. (ball)
The ball is ____ the box, so I cannot see it.
Put your skates ____ the table before we go.
We play basketball ____ the gym every Monday.
The cat is hiding ____ the chair, so we can't see it.
The ball rolled ____ the bed and I had to crawl under it to get the ball.
My sister ____ tennis every weekend. (play)
He ____ to the swimming pool after school. (go)
____ your brother like playing chess? (do)
My dog ____ fast when we play in the garden. (run)
I ____ a new football and two bats.
She ____ a red bike with a basket. (have)
____ ball here in my hand is mine. (near)
____ kites over there in the sky are very big. (far, plural)
My brother loves football. ____ plays every day.
Anna has a new bike. ____ bike is blue. (Anna)
I ____ ride a bike, but I can't swim yet. (be able to)
____ do you play football? In the park. (place)
____ is your favourite sport, football or tennis? (thing)
This is ____ apple from our kitchen.
We sit on ____ sofa in the living room.
Please close ____ door of the house.
My room has ____ old lamp on the desk.
There is ____ bed in my bedroom.
This chair ____ very big.
The windows ____ open today.
I ____ at home now.
My bed and my desk ____ brown.
We brush our ____ in the bathroom. (tooth)
There are three ____ in the kitchen. (chair)
The ____ in our house sleep in small beds. (child)
The cat is sleeping ____ the bed.
The lamp is ____ the table.
My toys are ____ the box in my room.
The clock on the wall is ____ the sofa.
The lamp is ____ to my bed.
My sister ____ her room every day. (clean)
Dad ____ TV in the living room. (watch)
____ your mum cook in the kitchen? (do)
The dog ____ on the warm carpet. (sit)
I ____ a big wardrobe in my room.
My house ____ four rooms. (have)
____ chair near me is very soft. (near)
____ curtains over there are blue. (far, plural)
My mum is happy because ____ kitchen is clean. (mum)
My dad loves ____ new armchair. (dad)
I am tired, so I ____ go to my bed and sleep. (be able to)
____ is the bathroom in your house? (place)
____ many windows are in your bedroom? (number)
I go to school by ____. (two wheels)
We saw ____ aeroplane high in the sky.
My dad drives ____ car to work.
____ train at the station is very long.
She is waiting for ____ bus near my house.
The pilot flies ____ aeroplane.
The cars ____ very fast on the road.
My boat ____ blue and white.
I ____ on the train now.
The two planes ____ ready to fly.
We walk with our two ____. (foot)
The big bus has many ____. (window)
Three ____ are driving the buses. (man)
The suitcase is ____ the bed. (below)
My ticket is ____ my bag.
The map is ____ the table. (on top)
Please wait ____ the bus stop.
The car is parked ____ the house, so we cannot see it. (at the back of)
She ____ to the airport every Monday. (go)
The train ____ at six o'clock. (leave)
He ____ his bike to the park. (ride)
____ your mum drive a taxi? (do)
I ____ a new red car.
The bus ____ four big wheels. (have)
____ train over there is going to the city. (far)
____ tickets in my hand are for the boat. (near)
My sister has a scooter. ____ is fast. (the scooter)
Tom likes planes. ____ wants to be a pilot. (Tom)
I ____ ride a bike, but I am still learning to drive. (be able to)
____ does the train leave? At three o'clock. (time)
